scope: Exact Package Approval layer for Class 1 Motion Production Batch 1 (Melee Family: Fighter, Swordman, Merchant) — Idle/Move/Basic Attack. Approval record + byte-for-byte package import only. No motion generated/regenerated, no PNG/GIF edited, no Neutral Master modified, no src/ or Combat change, no Runtime Integration started.

humanDecision.note: The package's own docs/human-decision-sheet-v1.md and every sidecar's approval block record humanVisualApproval as 'pending' as shipped -- this record is what turns that pending state into true, per the user's explicit decision in this task.

sourcePackage.deliveryMethod: 12-part split upload (chunk_size_bytes=3145728) with a manifest (class_1_motion_batch_1_split_3mb_manifest.json); parts 009/010 were missing on first delivery, re-uploaded and verified before reassembly
sourcePackage.note: ZIP itself is not committed to the repository (same convention as prior Archer/Class-1 packages); reassembled from 12 verified parts, then extracted and imported byte-for-byte, verified file-by-file by SHA-256 against the extraction.

importVerification: all 134 files re-hashed after copy; byte-identical to the extraction (diff of sorted sha256 lists empty)

sourceApprovalReference.title: Class 1 Neutral Master Batch v1 — Exact Package Approval
sourceApprovalReference.state: open, draft, unmerged, mergeable_state=clean (verified live before this task began writing)
sourceApprovalReference.note: This branch was created from PR #83's exact head, the lineage this Motion Batch package's own manifest declares as its Neutral Master source. PR #83 itself was not modified.

pr82.role: Archer Pilot runtime integration -- quality-pipeline reference only, not modified

pr84.role: Archer Pilot Acceptance record -- quality-pipeline reference only, not modified

perFrameHashSource: Every per-frame SHA-256 is recorded in each action's own imported sidecar JSON (e.g. fighter/idle/hero.fighter_idle_candidate_v1.json) and cross-recorded in data/technical-qa-report-v1.json inside the imported package tree -- the validator re-derives every hash directly from the imported PNG bytes and cross-checks against both, rather than this record duplicating all 72 hashes verbatim.

independentVerification.method: Manual PNG decode (IHDR/IDAT parse + zlib inflate + Paeth unfiltering) and fresh SHA-256, re-run against the imported binaries -- no claim from the package's own JSON was trusted without re-derivation.
independentVerification.impactFrameVisuallyConfirmed: spot-checked all 3 classes (frame 004 of each attack sequence) -- clear weapon-forward strike contact pose in every case
independentVerification.recoveryToNeutralCoherence: spot-checked representative class (Fighter, attack frame 007 vs neutral master) -- visually coherent guarded-stance return

boardPreview.note: Unchanged from PR #83's record. Not replaced, not regenerated, not revisited by this task. This package contains no board-preview asset of its own to defer.

runtimeAttackSpeedSynchronization.note: The package's own timing-summary-v1.json records attackRateSource='src/game.js' and designRateDivergenceRecorded=true -- i.e. the production team already flagged that these design-time attack durations were authored independently of any specific runtime attack_speed value and will need dedicated runtime-integration validation (as was required for Archer in PR #82's rework chain) before being trusted as-is against Combat's actual attack cadence. Not evaluated or resolved by this task.

nextAuthorizedGate: Human decision on canonical promotion and/or Runtime Integration authorization -- not started by this record.
